View this page

database¶

SQLite-backed persistence layer for all job types.

class automagician.database.Database(path)[source]¶

Bases: object

A wrapper around a sqlite3 database

db¶

a sqlite3.Cursor object that points to the database. It has the

Type:

sqlite3.Cursor

tables opt_jobs, dos_jobs, wav_jobs, gone_jobs, and insta_submit.
get_string_from_db(cmd)[source]¶

Executes the command and returns the first result of the query as a string

Parameters:

cmd (str) – The command to execute in the database

Returns:

str – The results from the database as a string

Return type:

str

delpwd(cwd)[source]¶

Deletes jobs from the database where the directory equals the given directory

Parameters:

cwd (str) – The directory to remove

write_plain_text_db(file)[source]¶

Prints out the text DB to the file in file. Overwrites content previously present

Parameters:

file (str) – the path to the file to write the plain text db to

get_opt_jobs()[source]¶

Returns the opt_jobs in this database.

Returns:

A dictionary where the keys are the job directoties, and the values are the opt jobs associated with said job directory

Return type:

Dict[str, OptJob]

get_dos_jobs()[source]¶

Returns the dos_jobs in this database.

Returns:

A dictionary where the keys are the job directoties, and the values are the dos jobs associated with said job directory

Return type:

Dict[str, DosJob]

get_wav_jobs()[source]¶

Returns the wav_jobs in this database.

Returns:

A dictionary where the keys are the job directoties, and the values are the wav jobs associated with said job directory

Return type:

Dict[str, WavJob]

get_gone_jobs()[source]¶

Returns the gone_jobs in this database.

Returns:

A dictionary where the keys are the job directories, and the values are the gone jobs associated with said job directory.

Return type:

Dict[str, GoneJob]

write_job_statuses(opt_jobs, dos_jobs, wav_jobs)[source]¶

Updates the database to include the jobs in opt_jobs, dos_jobs, and wav_jobs

If a job exists in the database, but is not present here that job is not touched

Parameters:

  • opt_jobs (Dict[str, OptJob]) – A collection of every opt_job known.

  • dos_jobs (Dict[str, DosJob]) – A collection of every dos_job known.

  • wav_jobs (Dict[str, WavJob]) – A collection of every wav_job known.

add_opt_job_to_db(job_to_add, opt_dir, commit=True)[source]¶

Adds (or updates) a opt_job in the database.

Parameters:

  • job_to_add (OptJob) – The job to add to the database.

  • opt_dir (str) – The directory that this job lives in

  • commit (bool) – Weither to commit the transaction. Committing the transaction is slower, but is needed to allow the data to be persisted. Turning this off is only recommended if you need to peform a lot of database operations and will commit at the end of peforming them.

add_dos_job_to_db(job_to_add, opt_dir=None, commit=True, add_opt_id=True)[source]¶

Adds (or updates) a dos_job in the database.

Parameters:

  • job_to_add (DosJob) – The job to add to the database.

  • opt_dir (str | None) – The opt_dir that the job is connected to. MUST be set if job_to_add’s opt_id is -1, or otherwise is not a row id of a opt_job.

  • commit (bool) – Weither to commit the transaction. Committing the transaction is slower, but is needed to allow the data to be persisted. Turning this off is only recommended if you need to peform a lot of database operations and will commit at the end of peforming them.

  • add_opt_id (bool) – If set will update job_to_add with the appropate opt_id

Raises:

ValueError – If there was not an opt_job at opt_dir

add_wav_job_to_db(job_to_add, opt_dir=None, commit=True, add_opt_id=True)[source]¶

Adds (or updates) a wav_job in the database.

Parameters:

  • job_to_add (WavJob) – The job to add to the database.

  • opt_dir (str | None) – The opt_dir that the job is connected to. MUST be set if job_to_add’s opt_id is -1, or otherwise is not a row id of a opt_job.

  • commit (bool) – Weither to commit the transaction. Committing the transaction is slower, but is needed to allow the data to be persisted. Turning this off is only recommended if you need to peform a lot of database operations and will commit at the end of peforming them.

  • add_opt_id (bool) – If set will update job_to_add with the appropate opt_id

Raises:

ValueError – If there was not an opt_job at opt_dir

add_gone_job_to_db(job_to_add, commit=True)[source]¶

Adds (or updates) a gone_job to the database.

Parameters:

  • job_to_add (GoneJob) – The job to add to the database.

  • commit (bool) – Weither to commit the transaction. Committing the transaction is slower, but is needed to allow the data to be persisted. Turning this off is only recommended if you need to peform a lot of database operations and will commit at the end of peforming them.

add_gone_jobs_to_db(jobs_to_add, commit=True)[source]¶

Adds (or updates) multiple gone_jobs to the database.

Parameters:

  • jobs_to_add (List[GoneJob]) – The list of jobs to add to the database.

  • commit (bool) – Whether to commit the transaction. Committing the transaction is slower, but is needed to allow the data to be persisted. Turning this off is only recommended if you need to perform a lot of database operations and will commit at the end of performing them.

reset_job_status()[source]¶

Sets the status of optimization jobs to 1 which means unconverged

machine
